name: Stranded on Honeymoon Island
overview: "Stranded on Honeymoon Island" is an Australian reality dating show where twelve singles are paired up, get married, and then "stranded" on a remote island for 21 days with minimal resources to test their new relationships. The show aims to combine elements of dating and survival challenges. The couples arrive on the island in their wedding attire and must swim to shore with minimal belongings.
